titleStmt.title: SII 25.67: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 67. (A.R. No. 67 of 1908.) VAḺUVŪR, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the prākāra of the Brahmapurīśvara temple.
The details of the date viz., Sarvadhāri, Māśi 30 are not sufficient for verification. The record may be assigned to c. 16th century on grounds of palaeography.

It records a deed of agreement (iśai ōlai) entered into by the ūravar of Vaḻugūr in connection with an offence committed by a certain Mīnavaraiyar. It mentions that the fugitive must be given the death sentence on the date of the record that the ūravar would pay 20 paṇam to a person who furnishes the information (paṟai) evidently regarding the whereabouts of the fugitive that a person who withholds the information would be excommunicated, that one who provides assylum to the culprit would pay the necessary fine (rājagaram) and put up with the āvikka[ḍa*]ṉ (a punishment ?).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
caṟuvātikāri varuṣam mācimātam 3 10tiyati vaḻukūr Ūravar Emmil porintiyicai Ōlaiyiṭṭukkoṇṭapaṭi . minavarāyar Avappaṭākkāri kaṭaippaṟṟa perumāḷ koyilile pūntu Aṭaittukkoḷḷukaiyil
nāḷatu cāka kaṭaivaṉākavum nāḷatu cākaiyil Ūrile Irupatu paṇam kuṭukka kaṭavom Ākavum melaikkum yātoruvar paṟai Eṭuttatuṇṭānāl Irupatu paṇam kuṭukka kaṭaivom Ākavum
paṟai Eṭutta Aṉṟu cākakkaṭaivaṉākavum yātoruttar Orunāḷ yiraṇṭu nāḷ tāmatam coṉṉatuṇṭāṉāl Avaṉ cātikkum piṟampāy naṅkai nācivaṉum vilakki naṉmai tiṉmaiyum tuṟantu cātikkup pi
ṟampākak kaṭaivaṉākavum yiṭaṅkuṭuttavaṉe Intaccetam Uḷḷatu kuṭuttu yirācakarattukkum Aparātamum kuṭuttu Āvikkaṭaṉaiyum paṭakkaṭaivaṉākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu yicai Ōlaiyiṭṭuk koṇṭom Iv
vaṉaivaro(m) mippaṭikku Ivai Ūṟku camainta Apimāṉa pūṣaṇa veḷār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻutiṉamaikku Ūṟkku taṇṭakanāṭṭu pramarāyar tirumalaiyār makaṉ Aḻakiya varataṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 25.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
